news.headline: EIA Natural Gas Change BCF Actual -100B (Forecast -93B, Previous -174B)
Medicenna reports DCR of 78% in MDNA11 trial with Merck's KEYTRUDA® in Phase 1/2 ABILITY-1 trial.
news.summary: In the recent update on December 5, 2024, the ongoing Phase 1/2 ABILITY-1 trial demonstrated a Disease Control Rate (DCR) of 78% (7 out of 9) in the combination escalation arm of MDNA11 with Merck's KEYTRUDA® (pembrolizumab). This included one documented complete response, one partial response, and five cases of stable disease. The trial data showcases a promising efficacy of the treatment regimen in combating the targeted disease.

news.headline: Backpack CEO talks about crypto exchanges, security, and Solana's growth in 2025 on Hashing It Out podcast.
news.summary: Armani Ferrante, the CEO of Backpack, recently appeared on the Hashing It Out podcast to share insights on the upcoming developments in the world of crypto exchanges, emphasizing aspects such as security, regulation, and the transformation of the Solana ecosystem by 2025. Ferrante's discussion shed light on the growing importance of ensuring robust security measures due to the increasing value involved in the industry. Additionally, he highlighted the pivotal role that regulatory frameworks will play in shaping the future of crypto exchanges. Furthermore, Ferrante expressed optimism about the evolving Solana ecosystem and the opportunities it presents for innovation and growth in the crypto space by the year 2025. This podcast episode resonated with listeners due to Ferrante's expertise and forward-looking perspective within the rapidly changing landscape of cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Howmet Aerospace Q4 revenue up 9% to $1.89 billion, beating estimates. 13% increase in aerospace sales, adjusted EBITDA at $507 million (+27.4% YoY) with adjusted EPS of $0.74 (+40% YoY). Company repurchased $190 million in Q4.
news.summary: Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) announced impressive fourth-quarter financial results, with revenue jumping by 9% year-over-year to reach $1.89 billion, exceeding the consensus estimate of $1.879 billion. The growth in revenue was primarily fueled by a substantial 13% increase in commercial aerospace sales. Revenue by segments showcased Engine Products at $972 million (+14% YoY), Fastening Systems at $401 million (+11% YoY), Engineered Structures at $275 million (+13% YoY), and Forged Wheels at $243 million (-12% YoY). Adjusted EBITDA, excluding special items, soared to $507 million (+27.4% YoY), with a margin rise to 26.8% from 23% YoY. Operating income also witnessed a surge of 36.5% YoY to $445 million, along with a 470 bps increase in margin to 23.5%. Adjusted EPS showed a robust performance at $0.74 (+40% YoY), outperforming the consensus of $0.72. Noteworthy repurchase activities included $190 million in the quarter, $500 million throughout the full-year 2024, and $50 million in January 2025, leading to a substantial retirement amount.

news.headline: Zoetis Inc (NYSE: ZTS) reports Q4 2024 EPS of $1.40, net income $632M. Revenue totaled $2.32B, up 5%.
news.summary: Zoetis Inc (NYSE:ZTS) announced their fourth-quarter 2024 results, revealing an adjusted EPS of $1.40 compared to $1.24 the previous year, surpassing the expected $1.34 consensus. The adjusted net income for Q4 2024 stood at $632 million, marking an 11% rise on a reported basis and a 9% increase on an operational basis. Sales for the same period totaled $2.32 billion, reflecting a 5% increase and meeting the consensus. Operationally, revenue for Q4 2024 saw a 6% rise compared to Q4 2023. In October 2024, the company divested its medicated feed additive (MFA) product portfolio, certain water-soluble products, and related assets.

news.headline: Tickets are selling quickly for the 24th Annual South Beach Wine & Food Festival in Miami Beach, Feb. 20-23.
news.summary: The highly anticipated South Beach Wine & Food Festival® in Miami Beach, Florida, is back on Feb. 20-23 and tickets are quickly selling out. This renowned event, known as the nation’s premier wine and food celebration, is expected to draw in large crowds. Secure your tickets soon to ensure you don't miss out on this exciting festival.

news.headline: Bernstein predicts Robinhood's massive growth with $105 price target as Q4 earnings show $1B total revenue, 487% increase in crypto revenue.
news.summary: Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) is expected to see significant growth due to its focus on cryptocurrency, a recent analysis by Bernstein reveals. The financial services firm raised its price target for HOOD to $105 after the company’s Q4 earnings showcased a remarkable surge in crypto-related revenue. Bernstein has named Robinhood its top pick for 2025. In Q4, HOOD achieved a milestone with total revenue hitting $1 billion for the first time. Crypto revenue experienced a meteoric rise of 487% from the previous quarter and 733% from the same period in the previous year. The analysis points out that the final quarter of the election year was particularly beneficial for crypto-related revenues. Bernstein predicts that this growth trend will persist and expects significant increases in both revenue and earnings per share (EPS) in the coming years.

news.headline: NATO’s Rutte: Ukraine will be involved in any way whatsover, in any peace talks.
Pita Pit introduces Pita Twists for $3.99 each at all locations in Canada for a limited time.
news.summary: A new product called Pita Twists has been introduced by Pita Pit in Montreal. These bite-sized pitas are priced at $3.99 and are currently on sale for a limited period.

news.headline: Spain data center market growing rapidly, with upcoming power capacity 4x existing data centers. Microsoft, Google, AWS investing billions in Madrid. Merlin Properties, Digital Realty lead operators in the region.
news.summary: A database titled "Spain Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" has recently been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com, with a focus on the data center landscape in Spain. The majority of the current rack capacity is centered in the vicinity of Madrid. Notably, Merlin Properties emerges as the leading data center Operator in the area, closely followed by Digital Realty. The forthcoming data center power capacity is projected to be four times greater than the current data center capacity. Major tech giants such as Microsoft, Google, and AWS have pledged substantial investments amounting to billions for new projects in Madrid, Spain, indicating a significant growth in the region’s data infrastructure.

Fear and Greed Index: 46/100 = Neutral
ISG's India Center of Excellence certified as 'Great Place To Work' for the sixth year in a row. #BestWorkplaces
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, ISG disclosed that its India Center of Excellence has achieved recognition as a "Great Place to Work" for the sixth year in a row.

news.headline: AGBO appoints Pete Wanat as President of Interactive Technology to lead gaming strategy, reporting to CCO.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, AGBO, an independent studio led by award-winning directors Anthony and Joe Russo, alongside partners Donald Mustard and Chris Brearton, has named Pete Wanat as President of Interactive Technology. Wanat will oversee the studio's gaming strategy, focusing on enhancing immersive digital experiences. Reporting to AGBO's Chief Creative Officer Angela Russo-Otstot, Wanat's appointment signifies a new direction for the studio in the interactive space.

news.headline: Crypto Fear and Greed Index 50/100 = Neutral
Gabelli Utility Trust (NYSE:GUT) declares $0.05 monthly distributions per share for April, May, and June 2025. #finance
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Rye, New York, The Gabelli Utility Trust (NYSE: GUT) announced that its Board of Trustees has reaffirmed its commitment to paying fixed monthly cash distributions. The Board approved cash distributions totaling $0.05 per share for April, May, and June 2025.

news.headline: Airbnb to release Q4 earnings Thursday, analysts predict 58 cents per share profit and $2.42 billion revenue. Stock price up 4.5% to $140.52 on Wednesday.
news.summary: Airbnb, Inc. (NASDAQ:ABNB) is set to announce its Q4 financial results on Feb. 13 after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings of 58 cents per share, an improvement from a loss of 55 cents per share in the previous year. The company is expected to report a quarterly revenue of $2.42 billion, up from $2.22 billion a year ago. In the Q3 results announced on Nov. 7, 2024, Airbnb performed below expectations and gave a lower revenue forecast for Q4. On the day prior to the announcement, Airbnb's stock increased by 4.5% to $140.52. For more detailed information, readers can access the latest analyst ratings on the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Robinhood (HOOD) stock surges after Q4 report exceeds expectations: Revenue $1.01B, up 115%; EPS $1.01, surpassing estimates of 42 cents. Crypto rev soared 700%. Net deposits hit record $16.1B, funded customers up 8% to 25.2M.
news.summary: Shares of Robinhood Markets Inc (HOOD) saw an increase in trading on Thursday following the company's impressive financial report for Q4. The revenue for the quarter was reported at $1.01 billion, surpassing expectations of $944.62 million. Earnings per share for Q4 were $1.01, well above the estimated 42 cents. Total revenue showed a significant 115% increase compared to the previous year. Transaction-based revenue stood at $672 million, a surge of over 200% year-over-year. Equities revenue rose by 144%, options revenue by 83%, and crypto revenue by more than 700%.Robinhood noted a record net deposit of $16.1 billion in Q4, with a notable 8% increase in funded customers year-over-year, reaching 25.2 million. Investment accounts also witnessed a growth of 10%. Multiple analysts raised their price targets for Robinhood post the financial results, reflecting the positive sentiment in response to the report. The details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Reddit stock falls despite strong Q4 earnings and sales. User growth lags expectations after big rally.
news.summary: Despite reporting Q4 earnings and sales that exceeded expectations, Reddit's stock experienced a decline. The user growth of the platform was slower than anticipated after a significant rally. This news comes after a period where Reddit had seen a surge in popularity.

news.headline: Herc Holdings exceeds Q4 revenue estimates with 14.4% growth to $951 million, driven by $91 million rental growth. Adjusted EPS $3.58, below estimate. Adjusted EBITDA up 15% to $438 million. Net debt at $4 billion. CEO uncertain about 2025 landscape.
news.summary: Herc Holdings Inc. (NYSE:HRI) posted a 14.4% year-over-year sales growth in the fourth quarter of 2024, totaling $951 million, surpassing the analyst consensus of $924.28 million. The revenue surge was fueled by a $91 million boost in rentals, derived from 2.1% pricing and 11.6% volume increases. Adjusted EPS climbed to $3.58 from $3.24, falling short of the estimated $3.94. Direct operating expenses increased to $324 million (38.6% of rental revenue) from $287 million (38.4%). Adjusted EBITDA rose by 15% year over year to $438 million, with the margin slightly increasing to 46.1% from 46.0%. As of December 31, 2024, net debt was noted at $4 billion, marking a 2.5x ratio.

news.headline: Zoetis stock drops 9% after missing 2025 guidance, despite beating Q4 metrics.
news.summary: On Thursday, shares of Zoetis experienced a significant drop by 9% following the release of its 2025 guidance, which fell short of expectations. Despite this, the company reported that its fourth-quarter metrics exceeded forecasts. The decline in Zoetis stock was notable in response to the disappointing 2025 guidance.

news.headline: Dutch Bros stock hits record high with 75% profit growth in Q4, surprising investors.
news.summary: Shares of Dutch Bros experienced a sharp increase on Thursday morning following the announcement of stronger-than-anticipated fourth-quarter earnings. The popular coffee chain saw its stock reach a new all-time high after reporting a remarkable 75% growth in profits. This significant jump in stock value highlights the positive reception of the company's financial performance among investors.

news.headline: Elon Musk rejects $400M Fed contract for 'Armored Tesla', DOGE may alienate consumers. Tesla stock rising.
news.summary: On Thursday morning, Tesla's stock witnessed a significant increase, building upon the growth it experienced on Wednesday. Elon Musk recently refuted claims of a $400 million federal contract for an 'Armored Tesla,' expressing concerns that involvement with DOGE may potentially distance consumers.

news.headline: Howmet Aerospace, a defense and commercial engine supplier, reports Q4 beat, guidance exceeding estimates, nears buy point.
news.summary: Howmet Aerospace, a provider of defense and commercial engines, revealed its fourth-quarter earnings and forecast exceeding expectations. The company's performance has led to it nearing a potential buy point, with a positive outlook indicated in its guidance and dividend increase.

news.headline: Hyatt announces $2.6 billion deal but tumbles on earnings miss; Wyndham reports mixed results after Marriott beats views.
news.summary: In a recent development, Hyatt revealed a significant resort deal worth $2.6 billion; however, the company faced a setback as it reported earnings below expectations, leading to a decline in its stock value. Concurrently, Wyndham announced mixed financial results. This announcement followed Marriott surpassing market expectations. The financial performance of these major hotel chains showcases a varied landscape in the industry.

news.headline: Preparation for Putin-Trump talks may take weeks or several months - IFax.

CNBC Washington Correspondent: I’m told the new tariffs President Trump announces today will NOT go into effect today. There will be a time delay of some months, possibly an April 1 start date. That’s still TBD. This will be a presidential memorandum today not an executive order, and USTR will be tasked with developing next steps.
Kōloa Landing Resort's Kaua‘i Poke Fest expands to two days on June 13-14, 2025 with a Poke Masters’ Table experience.
news.summary: Kōloa Landing Resort in Po'ipū, Hawaii, has revealed the extension of the popular Kaua‘i Poke Fest to span two days on June 13-14, 2025. Regarded as one of America's top ten food festivals, the event will commence with an exclusive celebrity chef experience called the Poke Masters’ Table. This will feature James Beard Award-winning Chef Sam Choy alongside other acclaimed guest chefs. The festival will proceed with the main event including a live poke competition, various tastings, and additional activities. The Kaua‘i Poke Fest is known for highlighting Hawaiian culinary traditions and is anticipated to draw large crowds.

news.headline: Kremlin: Ukraine will participate in talks.
PIN AI, founded by alumni from top universities, launches to protect personal data, prioritize individual needs over Big Tech.
news.summary: Today, PIN AI (Personal Intelligence Network) has been officially launched in San Francisco, with a goal to transform the way individuals manage, safeguard, and leverage their personal data. The company was established by graduates from Columbia, MIT, and Stanford universities. PIN AI is dedicated to encouraging the use of AI in a trustworthy manner through a clear framework that respects user choices. By focusing on individual requirements and refusing data consolidation, PIN AI guarantees that AI is used to benefit users rather than the agendas of major tech companies.

news.headline: Syniverse and Adobe partner for SMS messaging via Adobe Campaign, providing targeted and reliable messaging for global customers.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, global company Syniverse has partnered with Adobe (Nasdaq:ADBE) to integrate Syniverse's SMS messaging capabilities with the Adobe Campaign omnichannel marketing platform. This collaboration enables businesses to enhance the customer experience by sending targeted and personalized SMS messages worldwide in real time. The partnership aims to ensure the secure and reliable delivery of messages, optimizing engagement with customers.

news.headline: MediStreams had a successful 2024, achieving milestones with product innovation, client growth, and partnerships. CEO Coyle is pleased with the progress.
news.summary: In Roswell, Georgia, MediStreams, a prominent healthcare payment and remittance automation solutions provider, concluded a groundbreaking year in 2024. The company reached notable achievements in product advancement, client expansion, and strategic collaborations. Jim Coyle, CEO of MediStreams, described 2024 as a remarkable year for the company. Amidst challenges in the healthcare industry with manual processes and workforce deficiencies, the company saw significant success.

news.headline: Global fiber optical cable market to reach $108.73 bn by 2028, growing at 7.62% since 2018, led by Corning.
news.summary: A report titled "Fiber Optical Cable Market Opportunities and Strategies to 2033" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. As per the report, the global fiber optical cable market achieved a value of approximately $75.31 billion in 2023, indicating a growth rate of 6.84% since 2018. Forecasts suggest that the market will expand to around $108.73 billion by 2028, marking a growth rate of 7.62% from 2023. Subsequently, the market is projected to maintain a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.67% after 2028, leading to further growth.

news.headline: Putin and Trump call was a US initiative - Kremlin.
Kremlin: There's no decision yet on venue for the Putin-Trump meeting - Tass.
Dogecoin surged 218% in a year, outpacing Shiba Inu's 73%; Elon Musk references boosted DOGE in 2024.
news.summary: Over the last 12 months, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) has demonstrated a remarkable performance, surpassing Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) in terms of gains. Dogecoin, the leading meme coin, has seen an impressive surge of 218% in the past year, outperforming Shiba Inu, which experienced gains of 73%. The upward trend for DOGE began in March 2024 and continued through late 2024, boosted by positive market sentiment, particularly driven by references made by Elon Musk related to D.O.G.E. On the other hand, Shiba Inu has been concentrating on enhancing its utility by implementing significant token burns and launching its metaverse in a bid to increase adoption. Despite these strategic efforts, the impact on Shiba Inu's performance is yet to be fully realized. For more details, please refer to the full story available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: UK Defence Secretary Healey: The UK is accelerating preparation and work on security guarantees for Ukraine.
Hunton Andrews Kurth LLP releases AI Act Guide to help businesses comply with EU's AI Act, the first legal framework for AI.
news.summary: A law firm based in New York, Hunton Andrews Kurth LLP, has announced the launch of a new resource on Feb. 13, 2025, called the AI Act Guide for In-House Lawyers. This guide aims to assist businesses in adhering to the regulations set forth by the European Union's AI Act, which is considered the global pioneer in comprehensive AI governance. The guide offers a detailed and user-friendly approach for companies to navigate the requirements laid out in the AI Act, providing valuable insights and actionable steps for compliance. It serves as a practical roadmap for businesses as they work towards aligning their AI practices with the legal framework established by the EU.

news.headline: Kinetic, a fiber-optic provider, surpasses 600,000 Whole-Home WiFi installs using RouteThis Certify.(Route: 600,000, Location: Kitchener, ON)
news.summary: RouteThis, a prominent player in WiFi customer experience solutions, based in KITCHENER, Ontario, has shared exciting news. Kinetic, a fiber-optic internet service provider, has achieved over 600,000 Whole-Home WiFi installations thanks to RouteThis Certify's advanced features. This achievement showcases the effectiveness of RouteThis Certify in assisting major Service Providers to enhance their WiFi installation procedures, obtain remarkable insights into the Quality of Install (QoI) data, and offer exceptional support to customers.
